title: Avoid Unnecessary Boxing and Unboxing
description: Boxing and unboxing should be avoided when not needed, as it can lead to unnecessary object creation and decreased performance. Instead, rely on Java's implicit boxing/unboxing to convert from the primitive type to the wrapper type and vice versa.
recommendation: Use implicit boxing/unboxing or simple casts instead of explicit boxing/unboxing.

checks.message: Use implicit boxing/unboxing or simple casts instead of explicit boxing/unboxing.
